race.description: Skydive Australia: Leap For Life Conditional Hcp (Bm68)
race.comment: MY SHAREENA (6) gave away a big start on the bend before charging home to finish less than a length from the winner when resuming over 1400m at Newcastle. She won her only previous second-up run and looks the one to beat rising to the mile. GLASTONBURY GIRL (5) was narrowly denied in a three-way finish at Newcastle last start and has already proven herself at this distance. MCADAM (1) has won his past three starts and deserves respect despite rising slightly in grade. RICO SUAVE (9) resumed with a solid second over 1450m at Illawarra, racing on speed throughout, and strips fitter for that effort. He was also placed second-up at Goulburn earlier this year and should be competitive again.
